title: Radical Twists
description: A modpack that gets a new twist every week or so to mix stuff up
body:
A modpack that gets more and more wild each week. You can vote on what gets added next in our Discord. Less likely to get boring since things change often. Currently pretty light-weight.

**Features**

- Use steampunk technology to automate farms
- Become a mage and cast spells from your spellbook


More features will be listed here as more are added

Play with your friends on our server!
**Server Address** twists.tw25.net
